reviews.review_msg: She is a good sessional instructor.
A bit inconsiderate and strict with grading

The class was disorganized, lectures were boring, and I could not understand her during lectures. Half of the class failed the final worth over 40% consisting of 24 mp choice and 4 written questions. We also had a 30% group project that had little to no guidance on how to do well. AVOID IF YOU CARE ABOUT YOUR GPA

Nice person overall, but other than that she cannot do anything! Her grading criteria for the group project only has a sentence or two for each area. When you ask her questions, it's never clear. Will get annoyed at you if questions are continually asked. Doesn't give any guidance to prepare for the final exam. Lectures are so boring too.

Super nice, and she cares a lot. This doesn't always translate into teaching ability. This class was very disorganized. During lectures it was hard to understand what was going on because of unrelated tangents. No clear guidelines for most course material either. Really kind and I hope she improves, but currently I wouldn't recommend.

Nice person, however, does not seem like she's fit to teach the course. Spends half of the time rambling, and a good portion of the overall grade is based upon a group project with absolutely no guidelines. Not helpful in emails either.

Not to do with her personally, but she should not be teaching this course. Never seems to know what she's talking about or has confidence in anything she says, lectures are just confusing adaptations of the textbook. 30% of grade is a group project with vague grading criteria. Does not understand questions or is unable to answer. Avoid if possible!

I felt that she spends more time on insignificant topics that are rarely about the course. Tends to ask questions and wait up to 5 minutes for an answer. There was a lot of class presentations that I felt took away from learning course material.

She's a very nice lady, but her lectures are boring and hard to follow. There is a bit of a language barrier, and she tries to use text-to-speech subtitles, but it's even more confusing. She expects participation in class despite teaching a 200+ person class, SHE WILL WAIT TILL SOMEONE SAYS SOMETHING. I WAS looking forward to this class...

I was excited to take this class but it's unfortunate because she does not add any supplemental information past what is on the slides considering it is also a 3 hour lecture. Not a very engaging professor at all.

She's a friendly prof but was disappointed as this was a class I was looking forward to and my experience in it has been sub par. She is a fair grader but lectures are poorly structured and hard to follow along with 30% of the grade being based on a group project. She also reads directly from her slides with no additional information.
